text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Buuut whyyyyy?! Why the Satsuki Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I thought you agreed to take this slow. Why are
you doing this, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Sometimes we need to challenge ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Buuut, what if the challenge is too muuuch? Of all
the raceees...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Finally, it is my time to shine. This
young Overlord is ready to stamp her footsteps
into those verdant tracks!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, why hello there, Ayabe. I'm looking forward
to today. We should run as we would waltz,
gracefully and elegantly.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't have time for that. I only want to win.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Egad, you are cold like ice.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You would heed my request, wouldn't you? Don't
you wish to enjoy the festivities?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'd be happy to come along!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. I just thought of something good.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This could be practice! I don't have a chance of
winning, so instead, I'll run with Opera O to build
up some experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...She takes off with her tail wagging. I'd like for
her to at least get a taste of what the Triple
Crown races are like.
